jiuwen.harness

jiuwen.harness#

DeepAgent#

class jiuwen.harness.DeepAgent(client: LLMClient, config: DeepAgentConfig)#

Coding agent with bash/read/write tools. Extends ReActAgent.

workspace: Workspace
config: DeepAgentConfig

DeepAgentConfig#

class jiuwen.harness.DeepAgentConfig#
workspace_dir: str (default ".")
system_prompt: str
max_iterations: int (default 50)

Workspace#

class jiuwen.harness.Workspace(root_dir: str = '.')#
list_files(pattern: str = '*') → list[str]#
read_file(path: str) → str#
write_file(path: str, content: str) → None#
exists(path: str) → bool#

create_deep_agent#

jiuwen.harness.create_deep_agent(client=None, workspace_dir='.', system_prompt=None, max_iterations=50) → DeepAgent#

Factory with sensible defaults.

PromptBuilder#

class jiuwen.harness.PromptBuilder(sections: list[BaseSection] | None = None)#

Composes prompt sections.

add_section(section: BaseSection) → None#
build(context: dict | None = None) → str#

BaseSection#

class jiuwen.harness.BaseSection#

Abstract base for prompt sections.

build(context: dict) → str#

Built-in Sections#

class jiuwen.harness.IdentitySection(role: str | None = None)#
class jiuwen.harness.ToolsSection#
class jiuwen.harness.SafetySection#
class jiuwen.harness.WorkspaceSection#

Task Loop#

class jiuwen.harness.TaskEvent(type: str, data: dict = {}, timestamp: float = ...)#
class jiuwen.harness.EventHandler#
async on_event(event: TaskEvent) -> None
class jiuwen.harness.LoggingHandler#

Logs events to stderr. Extends EventHandler.

class jiuwen.harness.TaskExecutor(agent, handlers: list[EventHandler] | None = None)#
async execute(task: str, session=None) -> dict
class jiuwen.harness.LoopCoordinator(executor: TaskExecutor)#
async submit(task: str, session=None) -> None
async run() -> None
